nasb.text: Then he went inside and measured each side pillar of the doorway, two cubits, and the doorway, six cubits high; and the width of the doorway, seven cubits.

esv.text: Then he went into the inner room and measured the jambs of the entrance, two cubits; and the entrance, six cubits; and the sidewalls on either side of the entrance, seven cubits.

cnv.text: 他進了內殿，量了門口的牆柱，各厚一公尺；入口寬三公尺，門的內牆各寬三公尺半。

ccb.text: 他到内殿的入口，量两边的墙柱，各一米宽，门宽三米，两边的墙各宽三点五米。
